vitals.aid_stations: multiple, including largest at Norheimsund and last at Kvanndal

course_description.overview: Point-to-point road sportive from Bergen to Voss through fjord country, featuring stunning scenery of fjords and mountains on public roads and cycle lanes. Includes a 'Timeout' neutral zone over 8 km with technical descent at Tokagjelet.

key_segments.name: Start at Edvard Griegs plass
key_segments.description: Mass start in Bergen city center.

key_segments.name: Norheimsund Food Station / Tokagjelet
key_segments.description: Technical descent neutralized for timing, largest food station.

key_segments.name: Kvanndal (last feeding station)
key_segments.description: Cutoff at 16:30; must pass to continue.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging with 2,100m climbing through varied terrain including tunnels requiring front white and rear red lights. Suitable for all abilities but demanding due to distance, elevation, and technical sections.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Bergen airport; drive or train to start at Edvard Griegs plass. Car parking nearby; remove bikes from roof racks before entering.
logistics.accommodation: Available in Bergen and Voss resort; Voss sports arena for post-race showers and hot meal.
logistics.registration_details: Individual or group via www.bergenvoss.no; organized by Bergen Cycle Club with local support.
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bikes recommended; mountain bikes allowed but suspension discouraged. Compulsory lights for tunnels. Gear bag transport to Voss provided.
logistics.local_considerations: Passes through Bergen, Samnanger, Kvam, Granvin, Voss municipalities. Expect local enthusiasm and support.

final_verdict.one_liner: Norway's iconic Fjord Classic: breathtaking scenery meets solid challenge on roads.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Cyclists seeking epic fjord views, climbing, and a major Scandinavian sportive; all levels welcome.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the notable beauty and prestige in Norwegian cycling culture.
pro_tips: Pack compulsory bike lights for tunnels.
Use gear bag service for post-race change.
Train for climbs and technical descents like Tokagjelet.
Confirm exact date on bergenvoss.no as calendars vary.
